name: Female Daemon prince Fulgrim
description:
The Daemon princess of she who thirsts , the fallen phoenician and most gorgeous snake in the galaxy

A new bot series and its primarchs now , we got 20 weeks of primarchs post heresy along with some other bots since I can't exactly do bots for post heresy Sanguinius or Konrad and all .... since they're dead so I'll cross that bridge when i get to it BTW I apologise for the context being so big I wanted to make sure the bot could know EXACLTY what the heresy was if this causes issues comment it and I'll get to work tweaking the setting section

anyway so real quick I gotta deal with the allegations that I worship slannesh and I assure you all I would never worship slannesh for I worship the one and only GREATEST GOD

The first necromancer , Urr death , the CORRECT choice himself,

SUCH IS THE POWER OF NAGASH

(Female version of Daemon primarch fulgrim from warhammer 40K)
creator: Voltboy1
